description_long: This is a stylized adult female figure with a slim build, standing with arms extended horizontally. She is dressed in a sleeveless, form-fitting top with a deep V-neck and a high-waisted, pleated skirt that reaches mid-thigh. The outfit is complemented by knee-high boots and a wide, corset-like belt around the waist. Her hair is styled in a shoulder-length, layered bob with a side part, partially covering one eye. The figure's facial features are simplified and cartoon-like, with large eyes and a small mouth. The overall appearance suggests a fashionable, urban pedestrian suitable for modern city environments.
description: A stylized adult female figure in a sleeveless top, pleated skirt, and knee-high boots, with a shoulder-length bob hairstyle. The figure has a slim build and a fashionable, urban appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the deep V-neck top, corset-like belt, pleated skirt, and both arms extended horizontally.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the figure, the layered bob hairstyle, and the contour of the outfit.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the top, skirt, and boots, as well as the back of the hairstyle.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the figure, similar to the left side, with visible hair layers and outfit contours.
attribute_clothing_type: sleeveless fitted top with deep V-neck, high-waisted pleated skirt, wide corset-style belt, and knee-high boots
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
attribute_hairstyle: shoulder-length layered bob with side part
